3091470.name: Holy Night
3091470.description:
Battle an Evil Force in a Haunted Space Cruise

A space cruise, The Princess of the Stars, from the Tsukuyomi Corporation, makes its journey from Earth to Mars full of passengers on board.

Suddenly, a horde of bloodsuckers attacks the crew and the passengers. You don’t know what the fuck is going on.

Come on! It’s fucking Christmas! It is a time of peace and love, a time to help others and open our hearts and... Shit!

An ordinary person against a supernatural menace

Holy Night is a bloodthirsty action-adventure metroidvania set in a haunted space cruise traveling to Mars. Explore a rich, non-linear world, rescue the crew and passengers, unlock unique combat skills, upgrade your weapons, and kill hordes of vampires and monsters that stand between you and your family to celebrate Christmas in time.

Beautiful hand-drawn 2D animations blended with immersive 3D environments 

The world of Holy Night is built by combining world-class hand-drawn character animations with deep, cinematographic 3D environments to immerse the player in an epic journey full of action and adventure.

At Petoons Studio, we love traditional animation. From an artistic perspective, nothing can match this handcrafted way of bringing game characters to life and imbuing them with personality.

Unlike procedurally generated or AI animations, manual work allows for precise control over every frame, capturing emotional nuances, organic flow, and unique details that make the gaming experience more immersive and cinematic.

Our team has worked hard to enrich the game's visual narrative and ensure that you, as a player, connect emotionally with the main character, making movements like a jump, an attack, or a facial expression feel authentic and memorable.

We hope that you enjoy and experience the adventure of Holy Night, feeling like the hero —a simple human being, full of emotions, with his flaws and virtues, yet capable of facing and overcoming obstacles and powerful enemies.

Holy Night is an indie title created with great passion by a humble team, completely dedicated to the project, to turn it into a high-quality game. If you're also passionate about animation, science fiction, horror, and action-adventure films, we hope you enjoy playing Holy Night as much as we enjoyed creating it.

Features

  • A deep non-linear story full of twists, turns, and sidequests.

  • Beautiful hand-drawn animations for the characters blended with immersive 3D sci-fi environments.

  • Unique real-time combat mechanics.

  • Improve your skills to face the most bizarre final bosses.

  • Spectacular intros and playable movie-like sequences.

  • Dynamic reactive environment and circular map never seen in the metroidvania genre.

  • An epic soundtrack full of emotions and iconic voice acting characters.

Planned Features

  • Local Co-Op: 2 players "Contra-Style".

  • DLCs to expand the world of Holy Night with more enemies, final bosses, and new game modes.

英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
